title: mentha arvensis f. ocymoides
intro: Mentha arvensis f. ocymoides, also known as American Wild Mint or Pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the wild mint plant native to North America. This plant is recognized for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of pulegone, a compound with antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis f. ocymoides include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, ease pain, and support overall well-being.
